releases.description:
## [1.8.2](https://github.com/chhoumann/MetaEdit/compare/1.8.1...1.8.2) (2023-07-30)

Merged PRs:
- [Fix update method duplicating square brackets with links](https://github.com/chhoumann/MetaEdit/pull/96) by @jaerri 
- [Allow using links in task heading for Kanban board](https://github.com/chhoumann/MetaEdit/pull/77) by @Bevaz
- [fix #45: only locate files (via kanban helper) that match the link name](https://github.com/chhoumann/MetaEdit/pull/79) by @hepabolu 

Thank you for your contributions!

releases.description:
# [1.8.0](https://github.com/chhoumann/MetaEdit/compare/1.7.2...1.8.0) (2023-03-02)


### Features

* now accepts every Dataview inline property format, e.g. `[key::value]`. Thanks, @theofbonin!

### Bug fixes

* Fixes #54 - now bold / italicized dataview fields can get updated. Thanks, @theofbonin!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Update Obsidian package. by @chhoumann in https://github.com/chhoumann/MetaEdit/pull/55
* Fix for #50 - which is an issue where QuickAdd would conflict with Excalidraw's autosave by @chhoumann in https://github.com/chhoumann/MetaEdit/pull/56
* Adds error notification, prevent unneeded changes by @ryanjamurphy in https://github.com/chhoumann/MetaEdit/pull/60

## New Contributors
* @ryanjamurphy made their first contribution in https://github.com/chhoumann/MetaEdit/pull/60

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/chhoumann/MetaEdit/compare/1.7.1...1.7.2

releases.author: chhoumann
releases.description:
### `update(propertyName: string, propertyValue: string, file: TFile | string)`
Updates a property with the given name to the given value in the given file.

If the file is a string, it should be the file path. Otherwise, a `TFile` is fine.

This is an asynchronous function, so you should `await` it.
releases.name: Improve Update in API

releases.author: chhoumann
releases.description:
- Add `update` endpoint to API. This allows users to update the meta of a file.
- Fix #13 - bad regex.
- Removed `process.env` code
- Fixed bug in KanbanHelper
- Various bugfixes and refactoring

## Demo of `update` with Dataview
![BnAVIV4XCM](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/29108628/119330631-b8fa8f00-bc86-11eb-89d4-de41edc7a95c.gif)

releases.author: chhoumann
releases.description:
**New features**
- Auto select prompt input field (Thanks, Murf!)
- Fix "All Multi" EditMode bugs + some UX bugs
- Better YAML parsing
- Auto update properties in files linked to from Kanban boards on lane change
releases.name: Kanban Helper + Bugfixes

releases.author: chhoumann
releases.description:
**New features**
- Easy property deletion
- Transform YAML properties to Dataview fields - and Dataview fields to YAML properties.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/29108628/118645389-2d44b680-b7df-11eb-8c68-9c3d4bc99112.png)
releases.name: Delete & Transform

releases.author: chhoumann
releases.description:
- Add or update YAML properties and Dataview fields easily
- Ignore properties to hide them from the menu
- Auto Properties that have customizable, pre-defined values selectable through a suggester
- Multi-Value Mode that allows you to detect and vectorize/create arrays from your values
- Progress Properties that automatically update properties/fields
  - Works with total task, completed task, and incomplete task counts. Mark a task as completed (from anywhere), and the file will be updated with the new count.

This is a working port from the original Templater script.
Improved how settings work and feel. Made progress properties automatic.
releases.name: Initial Release
